papers.title_en: Beyond GRPO: Introducing Adaptive Bias-Aware Policy Optimization for Enhanced Mathematical Reasoning in Language Models
papers.tldr: 本研究针对大语言模型在复杂数学推理任务中的对齐问题，提出了自适应偏差感知策略优化（ABPO）。针对现有方法如PPO计算成本高、GRPO在处理复杂推理偏差时存在局限的问题，ABPO通过引入自适应偏差调整机制，显著提升了模型在数学推理任务中的性能与效率，为强化学习对齐提供了更高效的解决方案。
papers.abstract_en: Reinforcement learning (RL) techniques like Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) andGroup Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) are used to align Large LanguageModels (LLMs) for complex reason-ing tasks. PPO has high computational costs, as …

papers.title_en: Vision-language framework for multi-sequence brain magnetic resonance imaging
papers.tldr: 本研究针对多序列脑部MRI自动解读中存在的跨序列推理难和协议变异性问题，提出了一种创新的视觉-语言（Vision-Language）框架。该框架通过整合多序列影像特征与文本语义信息，提升了模型在复杂临床场景下的诊断准确性与鲁棒性，为实现更智能、可解释的神经影像分析奠定了基础。
papers.abstract_en: Structural magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) is a cornerstone for diagnosingneurological disorders, yet automated interpretation of multi-sequence brain MRIremains limited by challenges in cross sequence reasoning and protocol variability …

papers.title_en: SynthFM-Few: few-shot adaptation of synthetic medical image segmentation foundation models with real medical images
papers.tldr: 本研究针对通用分割基础模型（如SAM）在医学领域表现不佳的问题，提出了SynthFM-Few框架。该方法首先利用合成医学图像训练基础模型，随后通过少样本学习技术，仅需极少量真实医学图像即可完成领域适配。研究证明，这种结合合成数据预训练与少样本微调的策略，能有效克服医学数据标注难的挑战，显著提升模型在真实临床场景下的分割精度，为医疗影像AI的快速部署提供了新思路。
papers.abstract_en: Medical image segmentation is essential for accurate diagnosis, treatment planning,and quantitative analysis. However, existing foundation models like the SegmentAnything Model (SAM) struggle with medical imaging due to substantial domain …

papers.title_en: Cross-neighbor-information-based pseudo-label for better semi-scribble-supervised medical image segmentation
papers.tldr: 针对医学图像分割中专家标注成本高昂的问题，本文提出了一种基于跨邻域信息的伪标签生成方法，用于半涂鸦监督学习。该研究通过挖掘邻域像素间的空间相关性来优化伪标签的质量，从而在仅有少量涂鸦标注的情况下显著提升分割精度，为缓解医疗数据标注压力提供了一种高效的弱监督解决方案。
papers.abstract_en: Medical image segmentation typically relies on large annotated datasets, butobtaining expert-labeled data is time-consuming. Training accurate models withlimited scribble annotations (semi-scribble segmentation) offers a practical solution …

papers.title_en: Efficient Deep Ladle-Net for fast universal 3D lesion segmentation on chest–abdomen–pelvis computed tomography
papers.tldr: 本研究针对胸部-腹部-盆腔CT扫描中通用病灶分割的复杂性，提出了Efficient Deep Ladle-Net。该模型旨在实现快速且准确的3D病灶分割，以辅助癌症患者治疗效果的评估。通过优化网络结构，该方法在保持高精度的同时显著提升了处理速度，为临床随访中的大规模病灶自动测量提供了高效的解决方案，克服了传统方法在处理复杂解剖结构时的局限性。
papers.abstract_en: Accurate evaluation of tumor size on follow-up computed tomography (CT) scans iscritical for assessing treatment efficacy in cancer patients. However, universal lesionsegmentation of CT remains a significant challenge due to the complexity and …

papers.title_en: Integrated system for characterization of malignant and benign adrenal lesions and differentiation of high‑and low‑risk adrenal cancer on CT scans using radiomics …
papers.tldr: 肾上腺癌是一种罕见且致命的疾病，晚期生存率极低。本研究利用国家级诊疗中心的临床数据，开发了一套基于CT影像组学的集成系统。该系统不仅能有效区分肾上腺病变的良恶性，还能进一步识别高风险和低风险的肾上腺癌，为临床精准诊断和风险分层提供了重要的影像学支持工具，具有显著的临床应用潜力。
papers.abstract_en: Adrenal cancer is a rare but deadly disease, with a 5-year survival rate of only 10-20% at advanced stages. Our hospital is a national center specialized in thetreatment and research of adrenal cancer. We propose a radiomics-based integrated …

papers.title_en: InViC: Intent-aware Visual Cues for Medical Visual Question Answering
papers.tldr: 针对医疗视觉问答（Med-VQA）中多模态大模型容易出现“捷径回答”的问题，本文提出了InViC框架。该框架通过引入意图感知的视觉提示，引导模型精准定位与临床问题相关的图像区域，从而减少对训练数据统计偏差的依赖。研究通过增强视觉特征与问题意图的对齐，显著提升了模型在复杂医疗场景下的推理准确性和鲁棒性。
papers.abstract_en: Medical visual question answering (Med-VQA) aims to answer clinically relevantquestions grounded in medical images. However, existing multimodal largelanguage models (MLLMs) often exhibit shortcut answering, producing plausible …

papers.title_en: Automatic Configuration of LLM Post-Training Pipelines
papers.tldr: 针对大语言模型后训练阶段（结合监督微调与强化学习）配置复杂、维度高且阶段耦合的问题，本文提出了一种自动化配置框架。该方法旨在有限的计算预算下，通过优化高维异构的配置空间，解决各阶段强耦合带来的调优难题。研究的主要贡献在于实现了后训练流水线的自动优化，显著提升了模型性能并降低了人工调参成本。
papers.abstract_en: LLM post-training pipelines that combine supervised fine-tuning and reinforcementlearning are difficult to configure under realistic compute budgets: the configurationspace is high-dimensional and heterogeneous, stages are strongly coupled, and …

papers.title_en: ACPO: Counteracting Likelihood Displacement in Vision-Language Alignment with Asymmetric Constraints
papers.tldr: 针对大型视觉语言模型（LVLM）在直接偏好优化（DPO）过程中出现的“似然偏移”问题，即模型对选择和拒绝响应的概率同时下降的现象，本文提出了 ACPO 框架。该方法通过引入非对称约束，在增强偏好对齐的同时，有效稳定了模型对高质量响应的似然估计，显著提升了模型的对齐效果和生成质量。
papers.abstract_en: While Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) has become the de facto approach foraligning Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs), it suffers from LikelihoodDisplacement, where the probability of both chosen and rejected responses …

papers.title_en: ForestPrune: High-ratio Visual Token Compression for Video Multimodal Large Language Models via Spatial-Temporal Forest Modeling
papers.tldr: 针对视频多模态大模型（Video MLLMs）计算与内存开销巨大的问题，本文提出了一种名为ForestPrune的高比例视觉令牌压缩方法。该方法通过创新的时空森林建模技术，对视频序列中的冗余信息进行深度剪枝。ForestPrune在保持模型理解能力的同时，显著降低了视觉令牌数量，为实现高效、低成本的视频语言任务处理提供了新的技术路径。
papers.abstract_en: Due to the great saving of computation and memory overhead, token compressionhas become a research hot-spot for MLLMs and achieved remarkable progress inimage-language tasks. However, for the video, existing methods still fall short of high …

papers.title_en: VISion On Request: Enhanced VLLM efficiency with sparse, dynamically selected, vision-language interactions
papers.tldr: 本研究针对大型视觉语言模型（LVLM）中视觉标记减少导致的性能瓶颈问题，提出了 VISion On Request (VISOR) 框架。该方法摒弃了传统的静态标记压缩，转而采用稀疏且动态选择的视觉-语言交互机制。通过按需提取视觉特征，VISOR 在显著提升推理效率的同时，有效保留了关键视觉信息，在多个基准测试中实现了性能与效率的更佳平衡。
papers.abstract_en: Existing approaches for improving the efficiency of Large Vision-Language Models(LVLMs) are largely based on the concept of visual token reduction. This approach,however, creates an information bottleneck that impairs performance, especially on …

papers.title_en: Perturbation: A simple and efficient adversarial tracer for representation learning in language models
papers.tldr: 本研究针对深度神经语言模型中语言表示学习难以追踪的长期挑战，提出了一种名为 Perturbation 的简单且高效的对抗性追踪器。该方法旨在解决在复杂模型中定位特定语言表示的难题，通过引入对抗性扰动机制来探测模型内部的特征编码。研究的主要贡献在于提供了一种低成本、高效率的分析工具，为理解和评估语言模型的内部表示学习提供了新的技术路径。
papers.abstract_en: Linguistic representation learning in deep neural language models (LMs) has beenstudied for decades, for both practical and theoretical reasons. However, findingrepresentations in LMs remains an unsolved problem, in part due to a dilemma …

papers.title_en: Towards GUI Agents: Vision-Language Diffusion Models for GUI Grounding
papers.tldr: 本研究针对GUI智能体的定位任务，挑战了自回归视觉语言模型（AR VLMs）的传统主导地位，提出利用离散扩散视觉语言模型（DVLMs）进行GUI定位。通过引入扩散机制，该方法能够更精准地将自然语言指令映射到界面元素坐标。实验表明，DVLMs在处理复杂图形界面时具有显著优势，为构建更强大的多模态GUI交互智能体提供了新路径。
papers.abstract_en: Autoregressive (AR) vision-language models (VLMs) have long dominatedmultimodal understanding, reasoning, and graphical user interface (GUI) grounding.Recently, discrete diffusion vision-language models (DVLMs) have shown strong …

papers.title_en: Mitigating the Reasoning Tax in Vision-Language Fine-Tuning with Input-Adaptive Depth Aggregation
papers.tldr: 本研究针对视觉语言模型（VLM）在监督微调过程中，感知能力提升却导致推理性能下降的“推理税”问题，提出了一种输入自适应深度聚合方法。该方法通过动态调整模型深度来处理不同复杂度的输入，旨在平衡感知与推理任务。实验证明，该方法能有效缓解微调带来的推理能力损失，同时保持或增强感知能力，为优化VLM后训练阶段提供了新方案。
papers.abstract_en: Supervised fine-tuning (SFT) on visual instruction data often improves perceptualcapabilities in vision-language models (VLMs) while degrading reasoningperformance, creating a persistent reasoning tax during post-training. We investigate …

papers.title_en: Learning to Predict Future-Aligned Research Proposals with Language Models
papers.tldr: 本研究针对大语言模型在辅助科研构思中难以自动评估创新性和合理性的挑战，提出了一种预测“未来对齐”科研提案的方法。通过利用历史数据模拟未来研究趋势，该方法能够量化评估模型生成的提案是否符合科学发展方向，为自动化科研评估提供了新视角，显著提升了辅助科研决策的效率与准确性。
papers.abstract_en: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used to assist ideation in research,but evaluating the quality of LLM-generated research proposals remains difficult:novelty and soundness are hard to measure automatically, and large-scale human …
